codeReview.summary: The feature delivers an idempotent SQLite initializer with the six required domain tables, schema version tracking, `features.as_of_timestamp` enforced as NOT NULL, and `odds_snapshots.is_frozen` present with a default unfrozen state. The diff and handoff align with the task contract, and the added tests exercise the core acceptance criteria, but the features-table uniqueness rule has a SQLite NULL edge case for non-windowed features.

issues.description: `UNIQUE (game_pk, feature_name, window_size, as_of_timestamp)` will not deduplicate rows when `window_size` is NULL, because SQLite treats NULL values as distinct. The mission plan expects non-windowed park/weather/baseline features, so rerunning those computations can silently create duplicates unless the schema or writer normalizes NULL window sizes.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared state is inconsistent on Windows: the environment library documents using the venv interpreter directly, but `.factory/init.sh` and `.factory/services.yaml` still prescribe bare `pip install` and glob-based `py_compile` commands that the worker had to bypass.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: C:\Users\bills\Documents\Personal Projects\MLBPrediction2026\.factory\library\environment.md:54-57 documents the Windows workaround; C:\Users\bills\Documents\Personal Projects\MLBPrediction2026\.factory\init.sh:24 uses `pip install -e ".[dev]"`; C:\Users\bills\Documents\Personal Projects\MLBPrediction2026\.factory\services.yaml:5-9 still lists `pip install -e` and `python -m py_compile src/**/*.py`; the handoff at C:\Users\bills\.factory\missions\83c0c194-72d1-4821-8b08-68a3497c3590\handoffs\2026-03-19T14-49-49-185Z__t3-sqlite-schema__a8725dde-6941-488b-8b3b-a68e7d758900.json:101-116 records the resulting justified deviations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `data-worker` skill still instructs workers to run `python -m py_compile src/**/*.py`, which does not match the documented Windows-safe workflow and caused a justified procedure deviation in this feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: C:\Users\bills\Documents\Personal Projects\MLBPrediction2026\.factory\skills\data-worker\SKILL.md:44-45 requires `python -m py_compile src/**/*.py`; C:\Users\bills\Documents\Personal Projects\MLBPrediction2026\.factory\library\environment.md:54-57 documents the Windows-safe alternative; the same handoff file records the deviation at lines 109-116.

summary: Pass. The commit satisfies the requested SQLite foundation work: it creates the six domain tables with `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS`, enforces `features.as_of_timestamp` as NOT NULL, adds `odds_snapshots.is_frozen`, and records schema version state. One non-blocking schema caveat remains: SQLite NULL semantics mean the current `features` uniqueness constraint will not prevent duplicate non-window feature rows.
